allow: Bash(gemini -p "You are one member of a technical council. The problem: Redesigning a desktop Electron app UI \(PromptDB - a prompt library app\). We have a new app icon \(3D database + speech bubble, PNG\) and 2 UI concept images showing: 1\) new brand mark using actual icon image in sidebar, 2\) purple/indigo dominant color scheme with vibrant glow effects, 3\) more polished cards with richer shadows, 4\) colorful tag chips. Current: pure CSS app with Inter font, blue \(#1F8EF1\) as primary, dark theme. Constraints: must stay pure HTML/CSS/JS \(no React/frameworks\), Electron app, must handle light/dark/oled themes. Propose your recommended approach. Include: Strategy summary \(2-3 sentences\), Key trade-offs, Risks and mitigations, Why alternatives are worse. Be opinionated.")
Bash(python "C:\\Users\\Aurel\\.claude\\skills\\ui-ux-pro-max\\scripts\\search.py" "electron desktop app prompt library productivity tool dark mode" --design-system -p "PromptDB" -f markdown)
